creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Sun Feb  9 20:33:50 2014
New Revision: 343541
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/343541
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r343541/

Log:
  - MYSQL option was defined twice. Remove the first occurrence.
  
  PR:		186600
  Submitted by:	Pakhom Golynga <pakhom706@gmail.com> (maintainer)
  Reported by:	Peter Kuyarov <fbsdq@peterk.org> (in PR 186451)

Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/zabbix22-server/Makefile

Modified: head/net-mgmt/zabbix22-server/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/zabbix22-server/Makefile	Sun Feb  9 20:29:37 2014	(r343540)
+++ head/net-mgmt/zabbix22-server/Makefile	Sun Feb  9 20:33:50 2014	(r343541)
@@ -72,7 +72,7 @@ CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-net-snmp
 
 OPTIONSFILE=	${PORT_DBDIR}/${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX}/options
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	IPV6 FPING JABBER CURL LDAP IPMI SSH NMAP ODBC JAVAGW MYSQL LIBXML2
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	IPV6 FPING JABBER CURL LDAP IPMI SSH NMAP ODBC JAVAGW LIBXML2
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	MYSQL IPV6 FPING JABBER CURL
 
 CURL_DESC=	Support for web monitoring
